advisories.title: creatinine_multiframe_authority_decision_v1.yaml runtime_consumed status not verified
advisories.detail: Guardrail 2 requires five listed governance artefacts to remain non-runtime. creatinine_multiframe_authority_decision_v1.yaml is referenced in the guardrail 2 intro text but is not in the explicit five-file list. Its runtime_consumed status was not read during hardening. Cursor should verify it is also runtime_consumed: false when inspecting it at Stage 4 before implementation.
